docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, BOLUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YANG, CHUN $1,588.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,728.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S, VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
